Standalone C implementations with differential verification, sanitizers, and fuzz smoke coverage.

## [Search]({{ "/search.html" | relative_url }})

## Verification

- Strict Clang warnings in test and fuzz builds
- Hand-written edge-case assertions in each `bh_tests` implementation
- Deterministic random differential testing in generated test mains
- libFuzzer smoke runs with address and undefined behavior sanitizers

## Hacks

<ul class="hack-list">
<li><a href="{{ "/hacks/abs_uint64_from_int64/" | relative_url }}">Absolute value as uint64_t</a> — Computes the absolute value of a 64-bit signed integer without branching, producing a uint64_t result. <span class="tag-brackets">[<a href="{{ "/tags/integer/" | relative_url }}">integer</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/absolute-value/" | relative_url }}">absolute-value</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/bit-shift/" | relative_url }}">bit-shift</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/branchless/" | relative_url }}">branchless</a>]</span></li>
<li><a href="{{ "/hacks/is_power_of_two_uint64/" | relative_url }}">Is a power of two (0/1)</a> — Tests whether a uint64_t value is a power of two. <span class="tag-brackets">[<a href="{{ "/tags/integer/" | relative_url }}">integer</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/power-of-two/" | relative_url }}">power-of-two</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/bit-test/" | relative_url }}">bit-test</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/branchless/" | relative_url }}">branchless</a>]</span></li>
<li><a href="{{ "/hacks/is_nonnegative_int64/" | relative_url }}">Is non-negative (0/1)</a> — Tests whether a 64-bit integer is non-negative, returning 1 for zero or positives and 0 for negatives. <span class="tag-brackets">[<a href="{{ "/tags/integer/" | relative_url }}">integer</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/sign/" | relative_url }}">sign</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/bit-shift/" | relative_url }}">bit-shift</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/branchless/" | relative_url }}">branchless</a>]</span></li>
<li><a href="{{ "/hacks/max_int64_pair/" | relative_url }}">Maximum of two integers</a> — Computes the maximum of two 64-bit integers without branching. <span class="tag-brackets">[<a href="{{ "/tags/integer/" | relative_url }}">integer</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/maximum/" | relative_url }}">maximum</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/comparison/" | relative_url }}">comparison</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/branchless/" | relative_url }}">branchless</a>]</span></li>
<li><a href="{{ "/hacks/min_int64_pair/" | relative_url }}">Minimum of two integers</a> — Computes the minimum of two 64-bit integers without branching. <span class="tag-brackets">[<a href="{{ "/tags/integer/" | relative_url }}">integer</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/minimum/" | relative_url }}">minimum</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/comparison/" | relative_url }}">comparison</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/branchless/" | relative_url }}">branchless</a>]</span></li>
<li><a href="{{ "/hacks/opposite_signs_int64_pair/" | relative_url }}">Opposite signs</a> — Detects whether two 64-bit integers have opposite signs. <span class="tag-brackets">[<a href="{{ "/tags/integer/" | relative_url }}">integer</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/sign/" | relative_url }}">sign</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/xor/" | relative_url }}">xor</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/branchless/" | relative_url }}">branchless</a>]</span></li>
<li><a href="{{ "/hacks/popcount_swar64/" | relative_url }}">SWAR popcount</a> — Counts the set bits in a 64-bit word using a classic SWAR reduction. <span class="tag-brackets">[<a href="{{ "/tags/bitcount/" | relative_url }}">bitcount</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/integer/" | relative_url }}">integer</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/popcount/" | relative_url }}">popcount</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/swar/" | relative_url }}">swar</a>]</span></li>
<li><a href="{{ "/hacks/sign_pm1_int64/" | relative_url }}">Sign (-1/+1)</a> — Computes the sign of a 64-bit integer, returning -1 for negative inputs and +1 otherwise. <span class="tag-brackets">[<a href="{{ "/tags/integer/" | relative_url }}">integer</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/sign/" | relative_url }}">sign</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/bit-shift/" | relative_url }}">bit-shift</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/branchless/" | relative_url }}">branchless</a>]</span></li>
<li><a href="{{ "/hacks/sign_mask_int64/" | relative_url }}">Sign mask (-1/0)</a> — Computes a sign mask for a 64-bit integer, returning -1 for negative inputs and 0 otherwise. <span class="tag-brackets">[<a href="{{ "/tags/integer/" | relative_url }}">integer</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/sign/" | relative_url }}">sign</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/bit-shift/" | relative_url }}">bit-shift</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/branchless/" | relative_url }}">branchless</a>]</span></li>
<li><a href="{{ "/hacks/signum_int64/" | relative_url }}">Signum (-1/0/+1)</a> — Computes the signum of a 64-bit integer, returning -1 for negatives, 0 for zero, and +1 for positives. <span class="tag-brackets">[<a href="{{ "/tags/integer/" | relative_url }}">integer</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/sign/" | relative_url }}">sign</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/bit-shift/" | relative_url }}">bit-shift</a>, <a href="{{ "/tags/branchless/" | relative_url }}">branchless</a>]</span></li>
</ul>
